RX line 

VALUES: 01 = Capsule 
02 = Ointment 
03 = Cream 
04 = Suppository 
05 = Powder 
06 = Emulsion 
07 = Liquid 
10 = Tablet 
11 = Solution 
12 = Suspension 
13 = Lotion 
14 = Shampoo 
15 = Elixir 
16 = Syrup 
17 = Lozenge 
18 = Enema 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: States and providers do not necessarily restrict the use of this field to just compound drugs.
